'''鈭歵-j-m-ng''' ('''katajmengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:holiday|holiday]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-j-m-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:holiday|holiday]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-j-m-ng
|-
! Lemma
| katajmengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitajmengoko|thitajmengoko]] || [[word:jitajmengoko|jitajmengoko]] || [[word:shitajmengoko|shitajmengoko]] || [[word:kitajmengoko|kitajmengoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutajmengoko|thuthutajmengoko]] || [[word:jujutajmengoko|jujutajmengoko]] || [[word:shushutajmengoko|shushutajmengoko]] || [[word:kukutajmengoko|kukutajmengoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutajmengoko|thutajmengoko]] || [[word:jutajmengoko|jutajmengoko]] || [[word:shutajmengoko|shutajmengoko]] || [[word:kutajmengoko|kutajmengoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutajmengoko|thutajmengoko]] || [[word:jutajmengoko|jutajmengoko]] || [[word:shutajmengoko|shutajmengoko]] || [[word:kutajmengoko|kutajmengoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetajmengoko|thetajmengoko]] || [[word:jetajmengoko|jetajmengoko]] || [[word:shetajmengoko|shetajmengoko]] || [[word:ketajmengoko|ketajmengoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotajmengoko|thothotajmengoko]] || [[word:jojotajmengoko|jojotajmengoko]] || [[word:shoshotajmengoko|shoshotajmengoko]] || [[word:kokotajmengoko|kokotajmengoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotajmengoko|thotajmengoko]] || [[word:jotajmengoko|jotajmengoko]] || [[word:shotajmengoko|shotajmengoko]] || [[word:kotajmengoko|kotajmengoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotajmengoko|thotajmengoko]] || [[word:jotajmengoko|jotajmengoko]] || [[word:shotajmengoko|shotajmengoko]] || [[word:kotajmengoko|kotajmengoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙tajmengoko|th忙tajmengoko]] || [[word:j忙tajmengoko|j忙tajmengoko]] || [[word:sh忙tajmengoko|sh忙tajmengoko]] || [[word:k忙tajmengoko|k忙tajmengoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatajmengoko|thathatajmengoko]] || [[word:jajatajmengoko|jajatajmengoko]] || [[word:shashatajmengoko|shashatajmengoko]] || [[word:kakatajmengoko|kakatajmengoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatajmengoko|thatajmengoko]] || [[word:jatajmengoko|jatajmengoko]] || [[word:shatajmengoko|shatajmengoko]] || [[word:katajmengoko|katajmengoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatajmengoko|thatajmengoko]] || [[word:jatajmengoko|jatajmengoko]] || [[word:shatajmengoko|shatajmengoko]] || [[word:katajmengoko|katajmengoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
